name: Brinno ATH1000 Outdoor Waterproof Camera Housing
description: Situatable for construction zones and outdoor projects, the ATH1000 Outdoor Waterproof Camera Housing is designed to be used with Brinno TLC2000/TLC2020 cameras.

features.Key Features:: For Brinno TLC2000/TLC2020 Cameras | 1/4" Mount Screw | IP67 Rated for Outdoor Use
